data.title: Inventors from Yucca Valley, Calif., created refreshMINTS for dry mouth relief. Clever two-in-one formula.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 20, 2026, two inventors from Yucca Valley, California, announced the creation of refreshMINTS, a specially formulated mint designed to quickly relieve dry mouth. The innovative two-in-one formula aims to stimulate saliva production, providing relief for individuals experiencing dry mouth. The inventors highlighted their motivation to address this issue and improve oral health with their unique product.

data.title: Functional unemployment improves in January but still higher YoY. Living-wage job levels rise for all demographics but gender gap widens.
data.description: In Washington on February 20, 2026, it was reported that there has been an improvement in the availability of living-wage jobs across all demographics in the United States. The percentage of the American workforce classified as "functionally unemployed" decreased in January from a peak in December, although it is still above previous levels. However, despite these overall positive trends, there has been a notable widening of the gender gap in terms of job opportunities and wages. This data suggests that while job levels are improving for various groups, disparities in the workforce, particularly based on gender, remain a significant issue.

data.title: Euroseas Ltd. (NASDAQ: ESEA) to announce Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026 before NY market opens.
data.description: Euroseas Ltd., a company trading on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ESEA, recently disclosed its plan to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 25, 2026, before the New York market opens. As a prominent owner and operator of container carrier vessels, Euroseas provides sea transportation services for containerized goods. This announcement was made from Athens, Greece on Feb. 20, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin down 23% in 2026, marking worst start ever with $4B withdrawn in 5 weeks, setting up for first consecutive monthly declines since 2015.
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has experienced a notable decline of 23% in the first 50 days of 2026, marking its worst start to a year on record. During this period, spot ETFs have seen outflows of almost $4 billion over five weeks. This unprecedented drop in Bitcoin value includes a 10% decrease in January followed by a 15% decline in February, making it the first time the cryptocurrency has faced back-to-back monthly losses to begin a year. Previous instances of double-digit drops in January were seen in 2015, 2016, and 2018, but each was offset by positive gains in February. If this trend continues, Bitcoin is heading towards its weakest consecutive monthly performance since 2022. This decline follows a 17% drop in 2025, a post-election year when Bitcoin typically performs better than in election years. The recent underperformance of Bitcoin against historical trends has raised concerns, with the ongoing outflow from spot Bitcoin ETFs contributing to the weakened market sentiment.

data.title: Kvika banki hf. shareholders authorized board to buy up to 10% of issued shares, with buyback program renewed on Mar 26, 2025. Reference to Dec 23, 2025 notification on buyback of shares.
data.description: During the Annual General Meeting on March 21, 2024, Kvika banki hf. shareholders sanctioned the board of directors to purchase up to 10% of the bank's issued shares, facilitating formal buyback operations. This authorization was reaffirmed at the Annual General Meeting held on March 26, 2025. Additionally, a notification on December 23, 2025, reiterated the buyback of shares.

data.title: Elon Musk's net worth is $672 billion, growing by $53 billion in 2026. He could buy Ford, GM, Rivian, and Toyota and still have $141 billion left.
data.description: Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA ) and SpaceX, has become the world's wealthiest individual in 2026, surpassing other billionaires. While many have experienced a decrease in their fortunes this year, Musk has seen significant growth. The top 10 richest people globally have collectively lost $45.6 billion in net worth due to declines in the tech sector. Musk's net worth has risen thanks to the recent merger of SpaceX and xAI, which valued the combined companies at $1.25 trillion. His ownership in this entity, along with his shares in Tesla, has boosted his wealth to approximately $672 billion based on estimates from Bloomberg. Throughout 2026, Musk's fortune has expanded by $53.0 billion. In comparison to other automotive companies, the market capitalization of rivals shows the potential companies Musk could acquire with his wealth. Note: The full version of this story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HVAC expert Ken Hansen advises on improving indoor air quality to reduce allergens in HelloNation. Characters: 104
data.description: In Kelso, Washington, on February 20, 2026, it was reported that numerous homeowners tend to overlook indoor air quality until they experience symptoms like sneezing, coughing, or itchy eyes. This issue is exacerbated in the Pacific Northwest region due to its damp climate, creating a favorable environment for mold and mildew to thrive.
